justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted all of the user's temporal requests throughout the conversation.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent consistently reported unavailability and asked the user to pick a new time without offering any alternatives, which led to a very long and frustrating conversation.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent made multiple redundant API calls by not remembering the topic and contact medium, and it also repeated the same question multiple times.
justifications.customer_experience: The customer experience was frustrating due to the agent's inability to proactively offer alternative times and its repetitive phrasing after each unavailability check.

overall_notes: The agent successfully found an appointment when the user explicitly asked for the earliest available slot, but its lack of proactive negotiation and repetitive responses made the conversation very inefficient and frustrating for the user.
